title: Eric Ries on TikTok: 'Would You Walk Away from $200M for Your Principles?'
summary: Eric discusses the Anthropic story and principled companies walking away from money on TikTok.
blockquote: Would you walk away from $200M for your principles and values? Principled companies walk away from money that conflict with their values. That's happening all the time. The recent Anthropic story prompts us to think hard about our own clear red lines.
